title: Quantity Surveyor
description:
To assess and identify variation order (VO) work for all subcontract packages

• To provide support in terms of measurement and pricing on the Mechanical / Electrical contract's VO claim

• To process monthly progress claim and final claim

• To attend to all relevant contracts administration and documentation for the project

• To work out cost estimation or budgetary cost on Mechanical / Electrical services

• To liaise with Consultants/ Main Contractors on VO and progress claims

• To liaise with suppliers for quotations

• To maintain relevant documentation in an orderly and proper manner

Requirements:

• Possess Professional Certificate/NITEC/Diploma/Degree in Quantity Surveying / Electrical / Mechanical Engineering

• Minimum 3 years of working experience in M&E construction industry not limited to shopping complexes, hotels, condominiums, office buildings, etc.

• Analytical, resourceful, independent, responsibility and able to work in a challenging and fast paced environment

• Good interpersonal, communication and negotiation skills

• Able to work independently

postedCompany.description:
EQUATION Technology & Cabling Pte Ltd was established in 2000 and has over 16 years of experience in the cabling industry.

Equation Technology was founded by Mr Eric Ong, who is now our Managing Director. With his guidance, Equation has grown into a reputable, dynamic SME company with a current strength of 60 employees and growing. Our workforce consists of various professionals in sales, engineering, technical and administration.

Our engineering & technical professionals started out as trained electrical, telecommunication & network cable installers. Today they are certi?ed cable support technicians in several products (e.g. AMP, Nexans, R&M, Commscope, Panduit etc.) and are well-rounded installers/technicians with various certi?cations such as CFOI, CFOT, CIT and so on.

Equation is very committed to serve customers with the best quality services in installation of IT infra structure cabling, control system for Building Management System (BMS), IBMS, telecommunications, structured cabling (Fibre Optic), Extra-Low Voltage (ELV), radio frequency RF Cabling for mobile phones, CCTV and security systems and maintenance works in Singapore and West Malaysia. Our installations are reasonably priced and we have completed various projects in sectors such as data centers, commercial buildings, hospitals, schools, retail stores and residential areas. Equation is planning its target market from Singapore to the Malaysia industry.  This business plan will lay out our goals and tasks to make this transition successful and create enough market share to succeed in this highly competitive market.

Over the years, we have successfully emerged as one of the reliable cabling contractors in Singapore and we will continue to go forward to provide consistent service and good quality works for our clients.
postedCompany.name: EQUATION TECHNOLOGY & CABLING PTE LTD
